title: select_with_fee assumes 2 Sapling outputs; silently wrong when Orchard is added
description: select_with_fee always calls sapling_logical_actions(n, 2) — hardcoded 2 outputs. This works correctly today because ZIP-317 logical_actions = max(spends, outputs) and the grace-actions floor equalises 1-output and 2-output fees for small n. But it works only because there are no Orchard inputs or Orchard outputs. When Orchard spending is added to build_shielded_tx, the fee formula becomes max(sapling_la + orchard_actions, transparent_la). sapling_logical_actions(n, 2) will no longer be the right input to zip317_fee. There is no comment warning that sapling_logical_actions is Sapling-only and must be updated if Orchard inputs/outputs are added. A contributor adding Orchard spending will see select_with_fee computing a fee that disagrees with FeeRule::standard() in builder.build, causing a cryptic builder rejection. Maintenance consequence: silent wrong-fee bug when Orchard is wired in.
